title: Crisp Bitter Peruvian Haggis Roast
description: A comforting Peruvian-inspired roast that blends the earthy flavors of haggis with tangy pickled mango, bitter radicchio, and aromatic herbs for a crispy, protein-rich dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and coat a roasting pan with olive oil.
Place the haggis in the pan and drizzle with dry white wine to keep it moist during roasting.
Baste the haggis every 10 minutes with a mixture of olive oil, minced garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper to build a flavorful crust.
Scatter pickled green mango and sliced radicchio around the haggis and bake for 35 minutes until the surface is golden and crisp.
Remove the pan, sprinkle lemon zest over the roast, and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the haggis slices with a side of cooked quinoa for an extra protein boost and a garnish of fresh herbs.
